title: Account settings
description: Manage your profile, language and password. Administrative settings like role and organization are managed by an administrator.

load.error: Could not load your account. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update how you appear and the language of the interface.
profile.displayNameHelp: The name shown across the app.
profile.emailHelp: Used for notifications and account recovery.
profile.emailManagedByIdp: Your email is managed by your identity provider.
profile.confirmPasswordHelp: Confirm your current password to change your email.
profile.emailPasswordRequired: Enter your current password to change your email.
profile.languageHelp: The interface language that follows you across devices.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Change your password and manage active sessions.

password.title: Change password
password.tooShort: The new password must be at least {{min}} characters.
password.mismatch: The new password and its confirmation do not match.
password.reuse: The new password must be different from the current one.
password.changedWithSessions: Your password has been changed. {{count}} other session(s) were signed out.
password.ssoManaged: Your password is managed by your identity provider (Microsoft Entra). Change it there.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Sign out of every other device while keeping this one active.
sessions.noneToRevoke: There were no other sessions to sign out.
sessions.error: Could not sign out other sessions.
sessions.confirmDescription: Every other device will be signed out. This session stays active.
